research_session.query: Best solution platform for retroreflectivity measurement on national highways - hackathon winning approach: website vs mobile app vs other

summary: Best solution platform for retroreflectivity measurement on national highways - hackathon winning approach: website vs mobile app vs other

features.description: Flutter mobile app project setup with camera, GPS, and TFLite dependencies
features.rationale: Foundation for entire mobile data collection component

verification.criteria: App runs on Android device with camera permission granted

features.description: YOLOv8n model exported to TFLite format, optimized for road marking detection (FP16 quantization)
features.rationale: Core AI for detecting road markings in camera feed

verification.criteria: Model detects white/yellow lane markings at >80% confidence in test images

features.description: Real-time camera feed processing with YOLOv8n TFLite running at ≥15 FPS on device
features.rationale: On-device detection eliminates latency and works offline

verification.criteria: Bounding boxes drawn around lane markings in live preview without lag

features.description: LED flash controller module that strobes at configurable frequency (40Hz default) synchronized with camera capture frames
features.rationale: Flash provides controlled illumination to isolate retroreflective signal

verification.criteria: Flash fires on every other frame; illuminated vs non-illuminated frame pairs captured

features.description: Luminance measurement algorithm: extract pixel brightness in detected marking ROI from illuminated frame, subtract ambient from non-illuminated frame
features.rationale: Core retroreflectivity estimation using camera as photometer

verification.criteria: Delta luminance value computed per marking detection; correlates with known reflectivity reference

features.description: OECF camera calibration module: map grayscale pixel values to luminance (cd/m²) using pre-captured calibration chart
features.rationale: Required to convert camera output to physically meaningful retroreflectivity units

verification.criteria: Calibration coefficients stored; pixel-to-cd/m² conversion tested against reference

features.description: RL score computation: convert luminance delta to Coefficient of Retroreflected Luminance (RL) in mcd/m²/lux using vehicle geometry constants
features.rationale: Produces standard RL metric comparable to handheld retroreflectometers

verification.criteria: RL values in plausible range (0-4000 mcd/m²/lux) for test markings

features.description: Safety rating classifier: SAFE (>100 mcd/m²/lux, green), WARNING (54-100, yellow), CRITICAL (<54, red) based on validated thresholds
features.rationale: Thresholds from peer-reviewed research; gives actionable PASS/FAIL output

verification.criteria: Correct color label assigned for each RL value in unit tests

features.description: GPS location tagging: attach lat/lng/altitude/speed/timestamp to each retroreflectivity measurement at sampling rate of 1Hz
features.rationale: GPS enables precise spatial mapping of highway segment conditions

verification.criteria: Each measurement record contains valid GPS coordinates; accuracy within 5 meters

features.description: Offline-first data storage: SQLite local database stores all measurements when no connectivity, auto-sync on connection restore
features.rationale: Critical for rural highway sections with poor connectivity

verification.criteria: Measurements captured in airplane mode; successfully synced after re-enabling WiFi

features.description: Survey session management: start/stop survey, session metadata (vehicle ID, surveyor, date, highway number), session list view
features.rationale: Organizes data by highway section for structured analysis

verification.criteria: User can start a named session, drive, stop, and see session in history

features.description: Live measurement overlay UI: camera preview with bounding boxes, real-time RL value, color-coded status indicator, GPS lock indicator
features.rationale: Gives driver/surveyor immediate feedback on road condition

verification.criteria: Dashboard shows green/yellow/red status in real-time as driving

features.description: Data upload API client: batch upload measurement records to FastAPI backend with retry logic and compression
features.rationale: Moves data from phone to server for central analysis

verification.criteria: 1000 measurement records upload in <30 seconds on WiFi

features.description: FastAPI backend: REST endpoints for measurement ingestion, segment aggregation, alert generation, and data export
features.rationale: Central data processing and storage layer

verification.criteria: POST /measurements, GET /segments/{highway_id}, GET /alerts all return correct data

features.description: PostgreSQL + PostGIS database schema: measurements table with geospatial columns, highway_segments table, alerts table
features.rationale: PostGIS enables efficient spatial queries for map visualization

verification.criteria: Spatial queries return segments within bounding box; indexes on coordinates

features.description: Highway segment aggregation: compute average RL, min RL, max RL, and dominant safety rating for each 100-meter highway segment from raw measurements
features.rationale: Aggregation makes individual point measurements into actionable segment-level insights

verification.criteria: Segment stats match manual calculation of test dataset

features.description: Real-time alert engine: trigger CRITICAL alert when any segment drops below 54 mcd/m²/lux; WARNING at 54-100; store alert with GPS coordinates and timestamp
features.rationale: Enables proactive maintenance scheduling before accidents occur

verification.criteria: Alert created within 5 seconds of critical measurement received

features.description: Next.js web dashboard project setup with Mapbox GL JS, deck.gl, Tailwind CSS, and ShadcnUI
features.rationale: Foundation for the analytics visualization layer

verification.criteria: Dashboard loads with Mapbox satellite map of India centered on Delhi

features.description: Interactive highway map with deck.gl PathLayer: color-code highway segments green/yellow/red based on retroreflectivity score
features.rationale: Core visual output — judges see the entire highway network health at a glance

verification.criteria: Highway segments visible on map with correct colors; hover shows RL value

features.description: Retroreflectivity heatmap layer: density heatmap showing concentration of critical/warning zones across highway network
features.rationale: Visually compelling for hackathon demo; shows problem at network scale

verification.criteria: Heatmap renders at 60fps while panning/zooming; red clusters in critical zones

features.description: Segment detail panel: click any segment to see RL history chart, photo evidence, measurement timestamps, and maintenance recommendation
features.rationale: Gives highway authority actionable data for maintenance decisions

verification.criteria: Clicking segment opens panel with chart showing RL values over last 7 days

features.description: Critical alerts feed: real-time list of segments below safe threshold, sortable by severity and location, with one-click navigation on map
features.rationale: Enables rapid response to dangerous highway sections

verification.criteria: Alert list updates in real-time; clicking alert flies map to that segment

features.description: Summary statistics panel: total km surveyed, % safe/warning/critical, average RL across network, segments improved this month
features.rationale: KPI overview for highway authority management reporting

verification.criteria: Numbers update correctly as new measurements added

features.description: CSV/PDF report export: generate maintenance priority report per highway section with GPS coordinates, RL values, photos, and recommended action
features.rationale: Makes findings actionable for field maintenance crews

verification.criteria: PDF downloads with proper table of segments sorted by RL severity

features.description: Demo data generator: seed database with realistic simulated measurement data for NH-48 (Delhi-Mumbai) to showcase full dashboard in hackathon demo
features.rationale: Essential for compelling live demo without needing actual survey data

verification.criteria: Dashboard shows realistic distribution of green/yellow/red segments on NH-48
